## Summary

Briefly describe the change.

## Why

Explain why this change is needed. Link an issue or discussion if applicable.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New rule
- [ ] Parser change/fix
- [ ] Reporter change/fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / Release
- [ ] Build
- [ ] Performance improvement/change
- [ ] Internal refactor
- [ ] Hotfix

## Breaking change

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes (describe required migration)

## Changes

-
-

## User-visible changes

If output, CLI behavior, reports or documentation changed, include a short before/after example.

Otherwise write: **None.**

## Validation

Commands run:

- [ ] `gofmt -w <touched Go files>`
- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `go run ./cmd/vaar lint ...`

Additional commands:

```text

```

## Tests

- [ ] Added tests
- [ ] Updated existing tests
- [ ] No tests needed (explain)

## Documentation

- [ ] Updated documentation
- [ ] Not applicable

## Release notes

One sentence description, suitable for the changelog.

## Reviewer notes

Anything reviewers should pay special attention to.

Examples:

- rule names
- parser behavior
- output format
- compatibility
- performance
- edge cases

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] Code is formatted
- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] Documentation is updated (if needed)
- [ ] Release note added (if needed)
- [ ] No real secrets, credentials or sensitive data is included
